landing.hero_subtitle: Clear, fast orders with no mistakes. All through WhatsApp.
landing.what_is_p1: Lapacho is an automated assistant that takes orders via WhatsApp, organizes them, and sends them ready to prepare.
landing.what_is_p2: No installation needed. No new tools to learn.
landing.what_is_p3: Your business works the same, but without the chaos.
landing.time_1: The system builds the full order
landing.client_1_desc: All businesses in one place, no searching for phone numbers.
landing.client_2_desc: The bot builds your order in seconds, hassle-free.
landing.client_3_desc: Notifications: received, preparing, ready, on the way.
landing.step_4: The business receives the order via WhatsApp
landing.step_5: Updates the status with one click
landing.step_6: The customer gets an automatic notification
landing.cta_final_subtitle: Less chat. Fewer errors. More time to grow.
